TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_hacul, title = hacul, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/hacul} }

S.FORM: == hacul == u zuma a kamu: nu Hulam:åċ¶æḞṀ,äṗġæḟ nu Amilika:milk nu Lipun:äṗġ u nanum nu uzip.
S.PHON: == Ä§aÊḊur~Éẅ == u zuma a kamu: nu Ä§ur~Éẅam:**,** nu amir~Éẅika:mir~Éẅk nu r~Éẅipun:* u nanum nu uzip.
